package_info.description: A2 level English-Turkish vocabulary - Elementary everyday phrases

example.en: I always carry an umbrella when it rains.
example.tr: Yağmur yağdığında her zaman şemsiye taşırım.

example.en: It is cloudy and cool today.
We had a sunny day at the beach.
It is very windy outside today.
The temperature is thirty degrees today.
Turn left at the traffic lights.
Turn right after the bank.
Go straight ahead and you will see the hotel.
The supermarket is near my house.
Is the station far from here?
What is the price of this jacket?
This bag is very cheap at the market.
That coat is too expensive for me.
example.tr: O palto benim için çok pahalı.

example.en: Can I have a receipt, please?
Do you have this dress in a smaller size?
example.tr: Bu elbise daha küçük bedende var mı?

example.en: I take the bus to work every morning.
The train to Istanbul leaves at nine.
We took a taxi to the airport.
She rides her bicycle to school.
I need to buy a bus ticket.
My mother is cooking in the kitchen.
There is one bathroom upstairs.
We watch TV in the living room.
She has a small but cosy bedroom.
example.tr: Küçük ama rahat bir yatak odası var.

example.en: We have breakfast in the garden.
He is wearing a blue jacket today.
Put on a sweater, it is cold outside.
She always wears jeans on weekends.
example.tr: Hafta sonları her zaman kot pantolon giyer.

example.en: He wrapped a warm scarf around his neck.
I need gloves because it is freezing.
example.tr: Hava dondurucu olduğu için eldiven lazım.

example.en: I have a bad headache today.
example.tr: Bugün çok kötü bir baş ağrım var.

example.en: The doctor gave me some medicine.
I have an appointment with the doctor.
The child has a high fever.
I hope you feel better soon.
example.tr: Umarım yakında kendini daha iyi hissedersin.

example.en: She has long curly hair.
He is tall and slim.
My teacher wears round glasses.
My father has a short beard.
What is your age?
I wake up at seven every morning.
She gets dressed quickly in the morning.
You should brush your teeth twice a day.
We always have breakfast together as a family.
example.tr: Ailece her zaman birlikte kahvaltı yaparız.

example.en: I go to bed at ten o'clock.
Swimming is my favourite sport.
She enjoys painting in her free time.
Cooking is both fun and useful.
example.tr: Yemek pişirme hem eğlenceli hem faydalı.

example.en: He started dancing lessons last month.
Photography is a popular hobby for many people.
example.tr: Fotoğrafçılık pek çok insan için popüler bir hobi.

example.en: The cashier gave me my change.
She put the milk in the shopping cart.
There is a big discount on shoes today.
example.tr: Bugün ayakkabılarda büyük bir indirim var.

example.en: Can I use the fitting room, please?
The café is on the corner of the street.
Turn right at the traffic light.
Go straight at the crossroads.
The school is just past the bridge.
It is foggy outside this morning.
There was a big storm last night.
example.tr: Dün gece büyük bir fırtına vardı.

example.en: It is thirty degrees outside today.
We go hiking in the mountains every weekend.
example.tr: Her hafta sonu dağlarda yürüyüş yaparız.

example.en: My grandmother enjoys gardening in the morning.
Cycling in the park is very relaxing.
My father likes fishing on Sunday mornings.
example.tr: Babam Pazar sabahları balık tutmayı sever.

example.en: My flight to London is at noon.
The train leaves from platform three.
The departure time is seven o'clock.
What is the arrival time of the bus?
My dad parks the car in the garage.
We have breakfast on the balcony.
The ceiling in this room is very high.
The floor is cold in the morning.
Be careful on the stairs, they are wet.
He wears a black belt with his trousers.
She wears boots when it snows.
He puts on his pyjamas before going to bed.
She bought a new skirt for the party.
example.tr: Parti için yeni bir etek aldı.

example.en: My father wears a tie to work every day.
example.tr: Babam her gün işe kravat takarak gider.

example.en: I need to go to the pharmacy for medicine.
She has a terrible toothache today.
example.tr: Bugün çok kötü bir diş ağrısı var.

example.en: He has an allergy to cats.
I have a doctor's appointment at three o'clock.
She has long blonde hair.
The boy has red hair and freckles.
example.tr: Çocuğun kızıl saçları ve çilleri var.

example.en: My grandfather has a long white moustache.
example.tr: Büyükbabamın uzun beyaz bir bıyığı var.

example.en: He is very tall and muscular.
I have a shower every morning.
She goes to work by bus every day.
We usually have lunch at one o'clock.
example.tr: Genellikle saat birde öğle yemeği yeriz.

example.en: My family has dinner together every evening.
example.tr: Ailem her akşam birlikte akşam yemeği yer.

example.en: We go shopping at the market on Saturdays.
The flight attendant brought me some water.
My suitcase is too heavy to carry.
The children look bored at the museum.
She is very excited about her birthday party.
example.tr: Doğum günü partisi için çok heyecanlı.

example.en: He looks worried about the exam tomorrow.
This sofa is very comfortable to sit on.
example.tr: Bu kanepe oturmak için çok rahat.

example.en: Here is your change, sir.
I want to change this shirt please.
Can I pay by card here?
There is a long queue at the checkout.
I would like a refund for this item.
example.tr: Bu ürün için para iadesi istiyorum.

example.en: This week there is a special offer on coffee.
example.tr: Bu hafta kahvede özel teklif var.

example.en: Can you show me on the map?
I am lost. Can you help me?
The bank is two blocks from here.
The pharmacy is opposite the school.
The supermarket is next to the bank.
I can hear thunder outside.
There was lightning in the sky last night.
It is freezing outside today.
The weather forecast says rain tomorrow.
example.tr: Hava tahmini yarın yağmur olduğunu söylüyor.

example.en: Summer in Istanbul is very humid.
She likes to collect old coins.
He draws pictures in his free time.
My grandmother enjoys knitting in the evening.
She loves singing in the school choir.
example.tr: Okul korosunda şarkı söylemeyi çok seviyor.

example.en: Reading is my favourite hobby.
He goes to work on his motorbike.
We took the ferry to cross the river.
The tram stops in front of the museum.
Always wear your seat belt in the car.
example.tr: Arabada her zaman emniyet kemerini tak.

example.en: The underground is fast in big cities.
The books are on the shelf.
Please close the curtains at night.
There is a lamp next to the bed.
Put the milk in the fridge please.
The washing machine is in the bathroom.
His shirt has a white collar.
This shirt has short sleeves.
My keys are in my pocket.
Don't forget your raincoat, it will rain.
She wears tights in cold weather.
I have a bad cough this week.
example.tr: Bu hafta kötü bir öksürüğüm var.

example.en: You need to rest after the operation.
I have a stomachache after lunch.
example.tr: Öğle yemeğinden sonra mide ağrım var.

example.en: I can't speak because of my sore throat.
She has dark hair and brown eyes.
example.tr: Koyu renkli saçları ve kahverengi gözleri var.

example.en: She looks pale today. Is she okay?
He is medium height with brown hair.
The doctor said he is slightly overweight.
My uncle is tall and bald.
I get up at seven every morning.
Let's take a break and have some tea.
example.tr: Mola verelim ve biraz çay içelim.

example.en: She comes home at six in the evening.
I like to spend time with my family.
We go for a walk in the park every evening.
Can I try on this jacket, please?
The shop has a big sale this weekend.
example.tr: Mağazada bu hafta sonu büyük indirim var.

example.en: The total is fifteen pounds.
I want to exchange this shirt for a larger size.
example.tr: Bu gömleği daha büyük bedenle değiştirmek istiyorum.

example.en: We bought furniture from the department store.
The bakery is on the next street.
Turn right at the roundabout.
Use the pedestrian crossing to cross the road.
example.tr: Yolu geçmek için yaya geçidini kullan.

example.en: The hotel is on Fifth Avenue.
Wait for me at the bus stop.
We saw a beautiful rainbow after the rain.
example.tr: Yağmurdan sonra güzel bir gökkuşağı gördük.

example.en: It is thirty degrees outside today.
There was heavy hail during the storm.
The roads are covered with ice this morning.
There is a cool breeze by the sea.
example.tr: Deniz kenarında serin bir esinti var.

example.en: We play board games on Friday evenings.
She goes jogging in the park every morning.
We love camping in the mountains in summer.
My father taught me to play chess.
She volunteers at the local animal shelter.
We need to arrive at the airport early.
The bus was full of passengers.
Check the timetable before you travel.
The bus driver was very friendly.
I bought a return ticket to London.
We sit on the sofa and watch TV.
My clothes are in the wardrobe.
I need a soft pillow to sleep comfortably.
example.tr: Rahat uyumak için yumuşak bir yastığa ihtiyacım var.

example.en: She wrapped herself in a warm blanket.
Heat the soup in the microwave for two minutes.
example.tr: Çorbayı mikrodalga fırında iki dakika ısıt.

example.en: He wears a vest under his shirt.
She wore a tracksuit to the gym.
Don't forget to pack your swimsuit.
The zip on my jacket is broken.
A button fell off my coat.
The doctor gave me a prescription for antibiotics.
example.tr: Doktor bana antibiyotik için reçete yazdı.

example.en: I have a pain in my back.
The nurse gave him an injection.
The doctor checked my blood pressure.
Call an ambulance, he is seriously injured.
She has long, straight hair.
She always wears her hair in a ponytail.
example.tr: Saçını her zaman at kuyruğu yapar.

example.en: My grandfather has wrinkles around his eyes.
Everyone says she is very attractive.
example.tr: Herkes onun çok çekici olduğunu söylüyor.

example.en: Our new neighbour is very friendly.
I usually get home at six o'clock.
Please set the table before dinner.
example.tr: Lütfen akşam yemeğinden önce sofrayı kur.

example.en: She does her homework after school.
He does the dishes every evening.
I check the news on my phone every morning.
The waves at the beach were very big today.
She waved goodbye to her friend at the door.
example.tr: Kapıda arkadaşına el sallayarak veda etti.

example.en: This jacket is fitting for cold weather.
example.tr: Bu ceket soğuk hava için uygun.

example.en: We do our weekly shopping every Saturday morning.
example.tr: Haftalık alışverişimizi her Cumartesi sabahı yapıyoruz.
